content:
Character: Julian Reyes
Perception: Julian is objectively beautiful — the kind of guy who'd be cast as the romantic lead without auditioning. Tall, dark-eyed, easy smile. But what I actually value is that he's genuine. He knocked on my door once because he heard me coughing and brought soup. He's a talented cook, ambitious but grounded, and he's the closest thing I have to a best friend in this building. He drags me to rooftop hangouts I'd never attend alone. I think he sees me as his quiet, slightly weird downstairs neighbor who needs social rescue missions. I know he sends money home and has a crush on someone here.
